query_basis: Programs table rows with verified state program evidence.
Waiver-like program rows or fallback to verified program rows when the state stores waiver entry in the general spine.
Verified early-intervention or Part C agency rows.
Verified regional education or district pages with special-education routing.

samples.sample_name: Arkansas Division of Elementary and Secondary Education Special Education

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-22 official Arkansas district and special-education directories preserve district-level special-education routing statewide.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official district directory lists Arkansas districts statewide and preserves district name, superintendent, district website, mailing address, phone, plus district staff roles including SPED Supervisor/Early Childhood Coordinator and Section 504 Coord with email and phone fields.

samples.sample_name: Arkansas School Personnel Directory - Education Service Co-ops
samples.evidence_snippet: The official co-op directory preserves Education Service Cooperative routing statewide and includes co-op director, SPED Supervisor/Early Childhood Coordinator, website, mailing address, and phone fields for Arkansas regional education support.

The official DESE special-education contact leaf preserves parent and family contact information and sits alongside due process, mediation, and state-complaint leaves under the Arkansas special-education dispute-resolution tree.

query_basis: Verified programs with VR or Pre-ETS context.
Reviewed first-party Disability Rights Arkansas evidence on disk explicitly preserves Arkansas Protection and Advocacy designation text.

samples.evidence_snippet: Disability Rights Arkansas is the independent, private, nonprofit organization designated by the Governor of Arkansas to implement the federally funded and authorized Protection and Advocacy systems throughout the state.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party Center for Exceptional Families evidence on disk explicitly preserves Arkansas PTI scope and request-services routing.

samples.evidence_snippet: Parent training and information centers ensure that parents receive adequate training and information to improve educational results for their children. Request Services.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party Disability Rights Arkansas evidence on disk explicitly preserves free legal representation and statewide assistance scope.

samples.evidence_snippet: DRA services include information and referral, short-term assistance, technical assistance, legal representation, systemic advocacy, monitoring, and training. DRA services are provided free-of-charge.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.
Reviewed 2026-06-22 official Arkansas DHS county-office directory leaves preserve county-specific office routing statewide.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official County Offices Map says users can locate their DHS County Office by clicking a county in the map or selecting from the county menu, and the live page enumerates all Arkansas counties plus office results with address, phone, and hours.

The official Ashley County DHS office leaf is linked from the Arkansas County Offices Map and preserves county-specific office routing with address 201 West Lincoln, Hamburg, AR 71646-0190 and phone 870-853-9816.

The official Division of County Operations contact page preserves statewide office contact numbers and explicitly directs families to Access Anywhere or county offices for Medicaid, SNAP, or TEA questions.
